description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a thick, black metallic head with a rectangular, blocky shape and flat striking faces on both ends. The handle is straight and cylindrical, predominantly black with a central section wrapped in a brown, textured grip for enhanced handling. The head appears solid and heavy, suitable for delivering powerful blows, and is securely attached to the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The hammer's surfaces are smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible signs of wear or damage. Its proportions and construction suggest it is intended for heavy-duty tasks in urban environments such as construction, repair, or demolition.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a black, block-shaped metal head and a straight handle featuring a brown textured grip. The design is solid, smooth, and utilitarian, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the black head and brown grip section on the handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flat striking face of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle extending backward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again showing the length and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back face of the hammer head and the end of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle with a brown, textured rubber grip section for enhanced hold.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, block-shaped sledge-type head with flat striking faces on both ends, made of solid black metal.
